subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Muhammad! Praise be to God that in the earliest days thou didst attain unto the recognition of the Lord of all beings, piercing the veils of the divines [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل محمد لله الحمد در اول ایام بعرفان مالک انام فائز شدی سبحات علما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @eulogies; reminiscences
